hero.badge: Open Source · MIT License · Strapi V5
hero.title: The Strapi Agency
hero.subtitle: We build open-source plugins that make Strapi better.
hero.description: Production-ready Strapi V5 plugins — full TypeScript support, OWASP-audited security, and zero vendor lock-in. Built by the team at ISOMORPH.

security.title: Security First
security.description: Every plugin is audited against OWASP Top 10. Rate limiting, input validation, and HMAC webhook verification built-in.

performance.title: Performance
performance.description: Optimized for Core Web Vitals. Minimal bundle impact, lazy loading, and efficient database queries.

support.title: Pro Support
support.description: Community tier with GitHub Issues. Pro and Enterprise plans include dedicated support and SLA guarantees.

comments.name: strapi-plugin-comments
comments.tagline: Full-featured comment system for Strapi V5
comments.description: Add a complete comment system to your Strapi backend. Supports nested comments, moderation, notifications, and multiple authentication strategies.
comments.shortDescription: Full-featured comment system with moderation, nested threads, and multi-auth support.

features.title: Features
features.subtitle: Everything you need for a production-ready comment system.

nested.title: Nested Comments
nested.description: Unlimited depth thread support with parent-child relationships.

moderation.title: Moderation
moderation.description: Approve, reject, or flag comments. Admin panel integration included.

auth.title: Multi-Auth
auth.description: JWT, API Key, and anonymous commenting with configurable permissions.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Email notifications for replies and moderator alerts.

search.title: Full-Text Search
search.description: Search across all comments with built-in Strapi filters.

pagination.title: Pagination
pagination.description: Cursor and offset pagination for large comment threads.

spam.title: Spam Protection
spam.description: Built-in rate limiting and optional Akismet integration.

reports.title: User Reports
reports.description: Let users flag inappropriate content for moderator review.

export.title: CSV Export
export.description: Export all comments to CSV from the admin panel.

webhooks.title: Webhooks
webhooks.description: HMAC-signed webhooks on comment creation, approval, and deletion.

i18n.title: i18n Ready
i18n.description: Full compatibility with Strapi i18n plugin.

typescript.title: TypeScript
typescript.description: 100% TypeScript with full type definitions exported.

rest.title: REST API
rest.description: RESTful endpoints with OpenAPI documentation included.

graphql.title: GraphQL
graphql.description: Optional GraphQL resolver extension for Strapi GraphQL plugin.

audit.title: Audit Log
audit.description: Full audit trail for all moderation actions.

sso.title: SSO Support
sso.description: Enterprise SSO integration via Strapi Enterprise auth.

customFields.title: Custom Fields
customFields.description: Extend the comment model with your own custom fields.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Get up and running in minutes.

install.title: Install
install.description: Install via npm and add to your Strapi plugins config.

configure.title: Configure
configure.description: Set permissions, moderation rules, and notification settings in the admin panel.

use.title: Use
use.description: Call the REST or GraphQL API from your frontend. Full documentation included.

strapi4.question: Is Strapi V4 supported?
strapi4.answer: This plugin targets Strapi V5. For Strapi V4, use version 1.x of the plugin.

frontend.question: Does it work with Next.js / Nuxt / SvelteKit?
frontend.answer: Yes. The plugin exposes a standard REST API and is completely framework-agnostic on the frontend.

migrate.question: Can I migrate from Community to Pro?
migrate.answer: Yes. Upgrade at any time — all your data stays in your Strapi database. No migration needed.

selfhost.question: Can I self-host?
selfhost.answer: The Community tier is 100% self-hosted and open source. Pro and Enterprise licenses are also self-hosted — no SaaS dependency.

support.question: What support is included?
support.answer: Community: GitHub Issues. Pro: email support with 48h response. Enterprise: dedicated Slack channel and 4h SLA.

pricing.title: Simple Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Scale when you need to.

about.title: About ISOMORPH
about.subtitle: We build production-grade tools for the Strapi ecosystem.
about.description: ISOMORPH is a web development agency based in Paris and Toulon, France. We specialize in Strapi, Next.js, and modern TypeScript stacks.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: Making Strapi V5 accessible with professional-grade plugins. Every plugin we publish follows the same four pillars: RGAA accessibility, eco-design, Core Web Vitals performance, and OWASP security.

openSource.title: Open Source First
openSource.description: All our plugins are MIT licensed. The community tier is always free.

quality.title: Production Quality
quality.description: TypeScript, tests, documentation, security audits — no shortcuts.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.description: Public roadmap, public changelogs, public issues. No black boxes.

success.title: Payment confirmed!
success.description: Your ISOMORPH license is ready. Keep your key in a safe place.
success.descriptionWithEmail: Your ISOMORPH license has been sent to {email}. Keep your key in a safe place.
success.saveKeyWarning: Save this key — it will not be shown again after closing this page.
success.licenseGeneratingHint: If it doesn't appear in a few seconds, check your email or contact support.
success.installStep1: Install the plugin via npm: npm install strapi-plugin-comments
success.installStep2: Add your license key to the plugin configuration (config/plugins.js)
success.installStep3: Restart Strapi — your license will be verified automatically at startup.
success.errorRetrieve: Unable to retrieve your order details. Please contact support with your Stripe payment confirmation.
success.errorNoSession: No payment session identified. If you just paid, please check your email.
